title: Your Probiotic Skin Supplement Is Built on Real Science. It Just Hasn't Been Tested.
description: The gut-skin axis is a legitimate biological concept — gut dysbiosis really can drive systemic inflammation that shows up on your face. Wellness brands know this, and they've built a billion-dollar supplement industry on it. The problem: the specific products being sold have almost never been tested in rigorous clinical trials, and the studies that do exist are industry-funded, strain-mismatched, and routinely underpowered. This piece investigates the gap between a real mechanism and the products claiming to exploit it.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Your Probiotic Skin Supplement Is Built on Real Science. It Just Hasn't Been Tested.
